title: Comparing Your Real Options for Selling Ebooks Without Stripe: The Honest Answer
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: If you're a digital creator in Nigeria, the harsh reality is that PayPal and Stripe have blocked your account, leaving you struggling to sell your ebooks. The lack of payment options forces you into a corner, making it difficult to monetize your work and reach your target audience. You're not alone in this situation – many creators in restricted countries face similar challenges. But the question is, what are your real options for selling ebooks without relying on these blocked payment processors? Let's break it down and find a solution that works for you.
What Each Option Actually Offers

When it comes to selling ebooks, you have a few options beyond PayPal and Stripe. One option is Gumroad, which allows you to sell digital products directly to customers, but it comes with a 3.5% + 30¢ per sale fee. Another option is Payhip, which charges a 5% transaction fee and has a more limited set of features. In contrast, Unchained Commerce offers a Full Stack Bundle that provides a comprehensive solution for selling ebooks, including automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts, all without any transaction fees. This option gives you more control over your sales process and allows you to keep more of your earnings.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

When it comes to restricted countries, Gumroad and Payhip have strict policies in place that can result in account suspension or termination. In contrast, Unchained Commerce is designed to work with creators in restricted countries, providing a safe and reliable way to sell ebooks without the risk of account closure. This is because Unchained Commerce uses a cryptocurrency-based payment processor, NOWPayments, which doesn't require KYC or buyer account registration. This makes it an attractive option for creators who need a payment solution that can handle restricted countries.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When it comes to payment speed, Gumroad and Payhip can take several days to process transactions, while Unchained Commerce provides instant automated delivery. In terms of fees, Gumroad charges 3.5% + 30¢ per sale, while Payhip charges 5% per transaction. Unchained Commerce, on the other hand, has no transaction fees, making it a more cost-effective option for creators. Additionally, Unchained Commerce provides a clear breakdown of the real costs involved in selling ebooks, allowing you to make informed decisions about your sales process.
Gumroad and Payhip may be more familiar options, but they come with significant fees and risks that can hurt your bottom line.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

When it comes to automation and delivery capabilities, Unchained Commerce stands out from the competition. Its Full Stack Bundle provides a comprehensive solution that automates the entire sales process, from payment verification to delivery of digital products. This means that you can focus on creating content, while Unchained Commerce handles the rest. With Unchained Commerce, you can also customize your delivery options to suit your needs, providing a seamless experience for your customers.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

Ultimately, the choice of payment processor depends on your specific situation and needs. If you're looking for a reliable and cost-effective solution that can handle restricted countries, Unchained Commerce is the clear winner. Its Full Stack Bundle provides a comprehensive solution that automates the sales process, eliminates transaction fees, and provides instant delivery. While Gumroad and Payhip may be more familiar options, they come with significant fees and risks. By choosing Unchained Commerce, you can focus on creating great content, while leaving the payment processing to the experts.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
Unchained Commerce provides a clear breakdown of the real costs involved in selling ebooks, allowing you to make informed decisions about your sales process.
